title: Registration
description: Pre-registration of a research unit's study parameters. Must be created before outcome data is revealed or computed. Contains only pre-event definitions, never outcome results.

target_asset.description: The asset whose price movement is being studied.

selected_clock.description: One of two clocks: action_clock (when the real-world action occurred) or information_clock (when information about it reached the market). NOT broadcast_time — broadcast_time is a proxy time, not a clock.

actual_time_basis.description: The actual evidentiary basis for the t0 timestamp. Provides transparency about what the t0 value represents.

primary_t0.description: The primary t0 anchor time, locked before outcome reveal.

primary_benchmark.description: Benchmark asset for relative reaction. Must differ from target_asset. For BTC events, only weak_proxy benchmarks are available.

sensitivity_benchmarks.description: Additional pre-registered benchmarks for sensitivity analysis. Must also differ from target_asset.

pre_event_movement_check_definition.description: Defines the pre-event movement check rules. Does NOT contain movement_detected results — those go in Outcome.

outcome_status.description: MUST be 'not_revealed' at registration time. Outcome data is a separate schema.

t0_uncertainty_seconds.description: Estimated uncertainty in t0 in seconds.
